title: SaaS Acquisition Due Diligence — Go / No-Go + Price
description: A faithful lift of the C-suite advisory + compliance skills from alirezarezvani/claude-skills (MIT), composed into one Corp-Dev / M&A decision. The knowledge is in the arrows. Four ingest lanes fan out (financials, product, market, legal); five C-suite lenses then run in PARALLEL — CFO (cfo-review + cfo-advisor), CEO (ceo-advisor), CTO (cto-review + cto-advisor), CRO (cro-review + cro-advisor), GC (gc-review + general-counsel-advisor) — deliberately with no cross-pollination, because running them serially would let the CFO's framing contaminate the rest (the skills' own 'Phase 2: use only your own analysis' rule). A synergy model rolls up the operating lenses; a two-sided thesis (cross-eval steelman vs devil's-advocate) is built BEFORE valuation so the number can't anchor the argument; valuation (financial-analyst DCF + business-investment-advisor NPV/IRR + saas-metrics-coach unit economics) prices it; and a compliance gate (compliance-os + compliance-readiness + soc2-audit-prep) sits LAST but truly vetoes. The IC memo fans in from valuation, both thesis sides, and the gate. A 200-word 'should we buy it' answer compresses these into one — this trace pulls them back apart.

intake.name: Deal Intake
intake.does: Frame the deal: target, asking price, the IC question, and the diligence scope each lane must cover.

ingest_financials.name: Ingest — Financials
ingest_financials.does: Pull the data room's financials into one validated pack: P&L, ARR bridge, unit economics, burn.

ingest_product.name: Ingest — Product & Tech
ingest_product.does: Structure the technical data room: architecture, stack, tech-debt inventory, security posture, AI features.

ingest_market.name: Ingest — Market & GTM
ingest_market.does: Structure the market read: TAM/segment, competitive position, pipeline, retention cohorts, ICP fit.

ingest_legal.name: Ingest — Legal & Compliance
ingest_legal.does: Structure the legal data room: cap table, material contracts, IP assignment, data/privacy, certifications.

lens_cfo.name: Lens — CFO
lens_cfo.does: The numerate skeptic. Burn multiple, unit economics, margin durability, bear-case survival. Independent verdict.

lens_ceo.name: Lens — CEO
lens_ceo.does: The strategic allocator. Thesis fit, the one thing that kills the deal, build-vs-buy-vs-partner. Independent verdict.

lens_cto.name: Lens — CTO
lens_cto.does: The architecture skeptic. Scaling cliff, tech-debt cost, integration TCO, security & AI surface. Independent verdict.

lens_cro.name: Lens — CRO
lens_cro.does: The pipeline-paranoid operator. NRR decomposition, pipeline coverage, discount discipline, concentration. Independent verdict.

lens_gc.name: Lens — GC
lens_gc.does: The General Counsel six questions. IP ownership, liability, data/DPA, regulatory trigger, employment/equity. Independent verdict.

synergy_model.name: Synergy & Integration Model
synergy_model.does: Roll the operating lenses (CFO/CRO/CTO) into base/bull/bear revenue + cost synergies, net of integration cost and dis-synergy.

thesis_pro.name: Thesis — Pro (Steelman)
thesis_pro.does: Fan in all five lenses; build the strongest evidence-backed case TO DO the deal, with assumptions and a vote.

thesis_contra.name: Thesis — Contra (Devil's Advocate)
thesis_contra.does: Fan in all five lenses; build the strongest evidence-backed case NOT to do the deal (or to walk on price), with a vote.

valuation.name: Valuation
valuation.does: Price the target three ways (DCF, comps, NPV/IRR on synergy cash flows) and reconcile to a recommended offer range AFTER the thesis.

compliance_gate.name: Compliance Gate (Veto)
compliance_gate.does: Select applicable frameworks, simulate the mock audit, and decide READY / CONDITIONAL / BLOCK — this gate can veto a financially attractive deal.

ic_memo.name: IC Memo
ic_memo.does: Compose the investment-committee memo: recommendation, price, both thesis sides, conditions to close, and the gate's verdict.

deliverable.description: A go / no-go decision on the acquisition with a recommended offer range, delivered as an investment-committee memo (ic_memo.md) backed by the reconciled valuation, the two-sided thesis (pro + contra), and the compliance gate verdict that makes the conditions-to-close binding.
